The '''''Warder''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigate]] converted to medical duty by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] continued in operation after the transition to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], and made up part of the [[Solo Fleet|fleet]] assigned to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] during the hunt for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] as part of Group Two.

{{Ship-stub}}
